title: 7 Recession Stocks That Can Survive Stagflation
text: With the major equity indices printing gallons of red ink this year, investors naturally began searching for recession stocks. However, a new source of anxiety now appears on the horizon: stagflation.

title: Entergy: Improving Financials, Solid Performance, Nice Valuation
text: Entergy is a large electric utility serving four states in America's Deep South region. The company showed strong year-over-year revenue and net income growth during the second quarter, which is likely to continue going forward.

title: 5 Defensive Picks to Stay Safe in Volatile September
text: We have narrowed our search to five utility stocks with growth potential for the rest of 2022. These are: NEE, SO, ATO, ETR and LNT.
